concerns.text: User Story 1 describes the core 'End-to-End Data-Driven Texture Prediction' journey but lacks an explicit anchor to a specific Functional Requirement (FR) or Success Criterion (SC) in its acceptance scenarios. While it mentions FR-001..005, the narrative flow does not explicitly state 'This story is anchored to FR-001' or similar, creating a potential traceability gap for the 'Independent Test' which relies on FR-011.

User Story 2 ('Model Evaluation & Feature-Importance Reporting') references FR-004, FR-005, FR-009, FR-010 in acceptance scenarios but does not explicitly anchor the story itself to these requirements in the narrative or a dedicated traceability clause. The 'Independent Test' relies on FR-010, but the story text does not explicitly state it serves FR-010.

User Story 3 ('Reproducible Containerized Execution') references FR-006 in the 'Why this priority' and acceptance scenarios but lacks a clear, explicit anchor statement (e.g., 'Anchored to FR-006') linking the story to the requirement. The 'Independent Test' relies on FR-006, but the traceability is implicit rather than explicit.

FR-001 references FR-011 at the end ('See FR-011'), but it does not explicitly state which User Story it serves. While it supports the data ingestion for US-1, the lack of an explicit 'Anchored to US-1' or 'See US-1' clause creates a traceability gap for the requirement itself.

FR-002 (Preprocessing) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story (e.g., 'Anchored to US-1') or Success Criterion. It is a critical step for US-1, but the requirement text does not explicitly state this relationship.

FR-003 (Texture Descriptor Computation) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is essential for US-1, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1' or 'See US-1'.
FR-004 (Model Training) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is the core of US-1, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1'.

FR-005 (Output Generation) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is the output of US-1 and US-2, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1' or 'See US-2'.
FR-006 (Containerization) does not contain an explicit anchor to User Story 3. While US-3 references FR-006, the requirement itself does not state 'Anchored to US-3'.

FR-007 (Logging) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It supports US-1 and US-2, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1' or 'See US-2'.

FR-009 (Alloy Family Validation) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is critical for US-2, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-2'.

FR-010 (Sensitivity Analysis) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is critical for US-2, but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-2'.

FR-011 (Synthetic Data Generator) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Success Criterion. It is critical for US-1 (fallback), but the requirement text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1'.

SC-001 (Cross-validated R²) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Functional Requirement. It is the success metric for US-1 and US-2, but the criterion text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-1' or 'See FR-004'.

SC-002 (Feature Importance) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Functional Requirement. It is the success metric for US-2, but the criterion text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-2' or 'See FR-005'.

SC-003 (Pipeline Execution Time) does not contain an explicit anchor to any User Story or Functional Requirement. It is the success metric for US-3, but the criterion text does not explicitly state 'Anchored to US-3' or 'See FR-006'.
